suggestions.topic: bal-devnet-7 launch status and EIP-8037 fixes
suggestions.rationale: bal-devnet-7 was planned for launch this week (May 14) with critical EIP-8037 simplifications. This is the key milestone before merging optimization changes back to glamsterdam-devnet-3.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam devnet-3 stability and optimization merges
suggestions.rationale: Optimization merges to bal-devnet-3 (now glamsterdam-devnet-3) were blocked pending bal-devnet-7 stability. With bal-devnet-7 launch imminent, this merger path needs confirmation.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8254 (deposit limit cap) decision for Glamsterdam
suggestions.rationale: PFI'd in #236 with open questions around deposit limits (512 vs variable). Blocking 200M gas floor target and creates block building complexity that needs resolution.

suggestions.topic: Reorg depth target (38 days) client feedback
suggestions.rationale: Action item from #236 for Toni to update EIP and gather client feedback. This affects Engine API PR 786 implementation and deep reorg testing strategy.
Approved for CFI in #236 but administrative action not yet completed. Quick confirmation needed to formally add to Glamsterdam scope.
Marked PFI for Hegotá in #235 with breakout call scheduled by Greg Colvin. No update provided in #236 on breakout status or next steps.
Frame transactions CFI'd as non-headliner in #233, opening AA proposals for Hegotá. No updates on competing AA proposals (Wallet Title Deeds, Scheme transactions) or selection timeline.
Action item from #236 for Stefan to create spec in EL channel to track state vs regular gas breakdown. Useful for EIP-8037 analysis but not blocking.
